name: Pastry Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the egg yolk, half of the sugar and cornstarch in a stainless steel bowl. Add one-third of the milk; combine until smooth.
2. Pour the remaining milk into a saucepan and sprinkle the rest of the sugar over it. Do not stir.
3. Add the vanilla bean to the saucepan. Heat to boiling point.
4. Remove from heat, then remove the vanilla bean.
5. Whisk together with the egg yolk mixture.
6. Return the mixture to the saucepan and heat until boiling again.
7. Reduce the heat and simmer for 2 to 3 minutes.
8. Remove from heat, sprinkle with a small amount of sugar to prevent skin forming, then let cool.
9. Stir into a mixing bowl using a wire whisk until smooth.
10. Add the kirsch.
